name: Regression/capability-statement-version
description: GET /metadata returns the correct CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion for the server's configured FHIR release (from VersionSpecificTests.cs, R4/R4B/R5/STU3). Only the version-check aspect is covered; per-resource-type creation coverage is out of scope.

test.name: GET /metadata returns a CapabilityStatement with a populated fhirVersion
test.description: GET /metadata must return 200 with a CapabilityStatement whose fhirVersion is present; the value is also informationally checked against known released version literals (warningOnly since the target's configured version isn't known ahead of time).

assert.description: Response body must be a CapabilityStatement
fhirVersion should be one of the known released FHIR version literals (warningOnly: list isn't exhaustive)

test.name: R4: CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion is 4.0.1
test.description: Runs only when this suite targets an R4 server; reuses the /metadata response from the first test.

assert.description: CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion must equal '4.0.1' for an R4 server

test.name: R4B: CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion is 4.3.0
test.description: Runs only when this suite targets an R4B server; reuses the /metadata response from the first test.

assert.description: CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion must equal '4.3.0' for an R4B server

test.name: R5: CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion is 5.0.0
test.description: Runs only when this suite targets an R5 server; reuses the /metadata response from the first test.

assert.description: CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion must equal '5.0.0' for an R5 server

test.name: STU3: CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion is 3.0.2
test.description: Runs only when this suite targets a STU3 server; reuses the /metadata response from the first test.

assert.description: CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion must equal '3.0.2' for a STU3 server
